title: NVPlayerHeads TAB
description: Allows you to see player heads in the tab on any server. The mod is fully compatible with both the client and server versions of the game.
body:
**NVPlayerHeads TAB** - Shows heads in the server tab and in the single-player world, regardless of the server or game version!

This mod works on both the client and the server.

No configuration required; it does everything automatically!
